mnemonics.title: Law of Total Expectation
mnemonics.content: LOTE: Law Of Total Expectation = Layered Onion Theory - Peel layers of conditioning

acronyms.usage: Used in probability analysis and algorithm design

visualTips.visualization: Imagine decision tree branches where each branch represents a Y=y condition

analogies.analogy: Like predicting exam scores (X) based on homework grades (Y)
